text: And they're off at Parkland! The pack is already jostling, but Star_Vader and Profu are making a clean break right from the start.
Profu is all over the back of Stevens1523 and takes the lead
BulletToothKep is on the attack! He's just muscled past Stevens1523 to take a powerful fourth position.
Schust3r21 makes a move! He's just slid past LoloCoko to take P6.
Stevens1523 is glued to Star_Vader's bumper! They are completely inseparable in this fight for P8
Yuri717 is all over the back of LoloCoko for P5! This is a real nose-to-tail scrap, and Yuri717 looks ready to strike
Dellzie is glued to MarmotMenace's bumper for fourth! The gap is nothing, this is a dead heat
Schust3r21 is on the charge! He's just muscled his way past MarmotMenace for sixth place
Spidernnam is on the charge, darting past MarmotMenace for P11
Buhlockay is breathing down Anjus's neck in P15, a photo finish for the position
Spidernnam is breathing down Star_Vader's neck as they fight for sixth! The gap is zero as they battle for every inch of track.
And Buhlockay is on the attack! He slingshots past Stevens1523, vaulting five spots into P10
Anjus is on the attack! He blasts past Mr_Pendejo to take P10
Look at Venomjr go! He's just muscled his way into P13
Stevens1523 is making a move on Mr_Pendejo, and it's a knife-edge battle for P13
_Andrew_ breathing down _TheSidia's_ neck! This is going to be a real battle for P17
